creator: haro@tk.kubota.co.jp
text:
1. Typo in example: 'vn0' should be 'vn1'
		
           vnconfig -e -s labels,reserve -S 400m vn0
           disklabel -r -w vn1 auto
           newfs /dev/rvn1c
           mount /dev/vn1c /usr/obj

	2. Some typo:

	   'boundry' -->  'boundary'
	   'seperated' --> 'separated'

How-To-Repeat: 
	% man vnconfig
